call_transcript:
Agent: Hi Eleanor, this is Mark calling from Finance Solutions. I see you recently inquired about a personal loan on our website. Um, how are you doing today? 
Eleanor: Good, thanks. 
Agent: Great! So, based on your application, we are pre-approving you for a $10,000 Personal Loan at a rate of 8.99%. This could really help with, you know, consolidating debt or maybe a home improvement project? 
Eleanor: I was thinking more about a car. 
Agent: Excellent! A car is a great use of funds. Now, the monthly payments would be approximately $198 for 60 months. Does that sound manageable? 
Eleanor: Hmm, yeah, that's… okay. What are the fees like? 
Agent: There's a one-time origination fee of $200, and that's it. No prepayment penalties. We pride ourselves on transparency. 
Eleanor: Okay. And the APR is 8.99%? 
Agent: Yes, absolutely. 8.99% APR on a $10,000 Personal Loan. 
Eleanor: Alright, sounds good. Let's do it. 
Agent: Fantastic! I just need to verify a few details…

Agent: Hello, Mr. Miller? This is Sarah calling from Finance Solutions. We have a special offer for our valued customers… 
Robert: Where did you get my number? I didn't give anyone permission to call me. 
Agent: Sir, it's a marketing list. We're offering a Signature Credit Card with a $2,500 credit limit at 19.99%. 
Robert: 19.99?! That's outrageous! I already have a credit card. 
Agent: Well, this card offers rewards points and… 
Robert: No, thank you. I'm not interested. And please, take me off your list. I've already told someone yesterday to stop calling. 
Agent: I understand, sir. I can… 
Robert: (Interrupting) No, you don't understand. I don't want it! Goodbye. (hangs up)

Agent: Hi Jessica, this is David from Finance Solutions. I'm calling regarding a referral from GreenTech Solutions. They mentioned you might be interested in a personal loan. 
Jessica: Oh, yeah, Mark mentioned something. I'm thinking about expanding my freelance business. 
Agent: That's fantastic! We can definitely help. We are pre-approving you for a $15,000 Personal Loan at a rate of 7.49%. This could provide the capital you need. 
Jessica: 7.49%? That's pretty good. What's the repayment schedule like? 
Agent: We offer flexible terms, from 24 to 72 months. A 60-month term would result in monthly payments of around $302. 
Jessica: Hmm, okay. Are there any hidden fees? 
Agent: Just a $150 processing fee. No prepayment penalties. We want to be completely upfront. 
Jessica: Okay. And what if I need to pay it off early? 
Agent: No problem at all! You can pay it off at any time without penalty. 
Jessica: Alright, sounds good. I think I'm ready to move forward. 
Agent: Excellent! Let's get started with the application process…

Agent: Hello, David? This is Lisa from Finance Solutions. I see you filled out an application for our Signature Credit Card online. 
David: Oh, yeah, I was just checking rates. 
Agent: Great! We're offering a $5,000 credit limit at 14.99%. It comes with rewards points and travel insurance. 
David: 14.99% is a little high, to be honest. I've seen lower rates elsewhere. 
Agent: Well, our card offers a lot of benefits… 
David: I appreciate it, but I think I'll keep looking. I'm not really in a rush. 
Agent: Okay, I understand. Would you like me to send you some information via email? 
David: Sure, that would be helpful. 
Agent: Great! I'll send over a brochure with all the details. Have a good day. 
David: You too.

Agent: Hello, Ms. Rodriguez? This is Kevin from Finance Solutions. We're offering a personal loan… 
Maria: (Interrupting) You guys called me yesterday! And the day before! I told you, I'm not interested! Where did you even get my number?! 
Agent: Ma'am, I apologize for the inconvenience. We are offering a $3,000 Personal Loan at 24.99%… 
Maria: 24.99?! Are you kidding me?! This is a scam! I'm reporting you to the authorities! 
Agent: Ma'am, please… 
Maria: (Shouting) Get my number off your list! Now! I'm going to file a complaint! (hangs up)
